overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt exploring a medieval harbor district at sunset. The scene features a dramatic red-orange sky over calm waters, with gothic stone architecture and dock workers populating the waterfront. The character walks along stone and wooden docks, through narrow wooden passages, and encounters armored guards in a historic harbor setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone waterfront promenade overlooking red bay at sunset

events.description: character begins walking left along the waterfront from a stationary position

agents.ego_description: standing on stone steps overlooking the water, then walking along the dock while observing the red sky and distant city

notable_agents.action: dock worker sitting on the stone edge near the water

entered.detail: raised stone platform with steps leading down to the water
calm water reflecting the dramatic red-orange sunset sky
silhouetted medieval towers and buildings across the water
weathered wooden planks forming the dock walkway
medieval stone buildings with arched doorways along the waterfront

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt standing on a stone dock platform overlooking a bay with dramatic red water reflecting the sunset sky. The distant gothic city skyline is visible across the water. The character begins walking left along the waterfront, passing a sitting dock worker, with stone harbor buildings lining the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy wooden dock promenade with harbor warehouses

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock, passing various dock workers and townspeople

notable_agents.action: dock worker carrying goods walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: large wooden sailing vessel with prominent white sails moored at the dock
tall wooden warehouse buildings with open loading areas

segments.scene_description: Walking along the wooden dock promenade, the scene features moderate crowds of dock workers and townspeople moving about. A large sailing ship with white sails is moored to the left, while stone harbor buildings line the right side. The wooden planks of the dock create a distinct maritime atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: open dock area with moored sailing vessels

events.description: character turns around and walks back toward the buildings, away from the water

agents.ego_description: walking past the sailing ship, then turning to head back toward the harbor buildings

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the moored sailing ship along the open dock, with the red water bay visible to the left. At around 35 seconds, the character turns and walks back toward the harbor buildings, causing the ship to move from the left side of the frame to the right as the perspective shifts.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow wooden passage between harbor warehouses

events.description: enters narrow wooden corridor between tall warehouse buildings

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow enclosed wooden passage between buildings

entered.detail: tall wooden plank walls forming a narrow passage between structures
thick wooden beams supporting the overhead structure

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow wooden corridor between tall harbor warehouses, transitioning from the open dock to an enclosed passageway. The lighting becomes darker and more diffuse, with wooden walls and support beams dominating the view. The open sky and water are no longer visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: open harbor yard with scaffolding and guard patrol

events.description: encounters patrol of guards in red armor and metal helmets

agents.ego_description: walking through the open yard, passing by guards and approaching the town center

notable_agents.action: guard in red armor and helmet walking toward the camera with weapon shouldered

entered.detail: mixed grass and dirt ground surface replacing the wooden planks
large wooden construction scaffolding with beams and platforms
burning fire pit with metal enclosure providing warm light

segments.scene_description: Exiting the narrow passage, the character enters an open harbor yard with grass and dirt ground. A large wooden scaffolding structure stands to the left, while a burning campfire provides warm lighting. The character encounters a patrol of guards in distinctive red armor walking through the area, with medieval houses visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a medieval waterfront that transitions from a wide view of a sunset bay into the bustling activity of a harbor promenade. It begins with Geralt standing on a stone dock overlooking red waters that reflect a dramatic sky and a distant gothic skyline before he starts walking left past stone harbor buildings and a resting worker. As he progresses, the stone gives way to a wooden dock promenade filled with moving crowds of townspeople and dock workers, with a large white-sailed ship moored to the left. The scene then shifts as the character walks past the vessel along the open dock, keeping the red bay in view before turning back toward the harbor buildings. This final change in direction causes the moored ship to swing from the left to the right side of the frame as the perspective pivots back toward the city architecture.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic wooden corridor into an open, bustling harbor yard. It begins as the character leaves the open docks to enter a narrow passageway between tall warehouses, where the lighting dims and the view is enclosed by heavy wooden walls and support beams. As the character moves forward, the oppressive enclosure gives way to a wide outdoor space with grass and dirt ground. The scene then expands to reveal a large wooden scaffolding structure and the warm glow of a burning campfire, while a patrol of guards in red armor passes by against a backdrop of medieval houses.
